ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipment (e.g., Second Class, Standard Class) */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the order */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit from the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid, Partially Paid) */,
  "warehouse_id" TEXT /* ID of the warehouse where the products are stored */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee who processed the order */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment of the customer (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the customer's location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date the stock was last updated */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount for the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit from the item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order (unit price * quantity) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product in the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the product in the order */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Return status (e.g., Not Returned, Returned, Refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "region_manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the region manager */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the supplier's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the supplier (1-5) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for delivery (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., Sales, Warehouse Manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* ID of the region where the employee works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
